rationale: Fingerprint not cleanly classified but all 7 generators follow the `function(t){let i=[];try{if(t.trim()=="")return i;...}catch{console.log(a)}return i}` pattern (cordova). Feed `""`: trim() == "" → return `[]` early. Rust `split_lines+filter_empty+json_extract(sentinel)` on `""` yields `[]` (filter_empty removes). Both empty.
